cells.value: Output -- FY2025 MRO TAM -- $8,971M reconciled (Services + PSC 1905 embedded)

Think-cell chart source tables for the target MRO deck. Nine blocks keyed by deck_script spec_id slug, each in the orientation think-cell expects to paste. Every numeric cell is a live formula (SUMIFS on Awards / J998J999Data; named ranges on Reconciliation / Scope Reconciliation). mro_work_segments / tam_composition / prime_landscape_tam each carry a dedicated Nuclear & Complex Overhauls row (PSC 1905 embedded MRO) so totals reconcile to RECONCILED_MRO_TAM.

FORMATTING RULE (do not remove): every numeric / percent cell on this sheet uses a zero-hiding number format so that any cell evaluating to 0 renders as blank. Required for clean think-cell chart pastes. If editing this file, preserve the NUM_FMT_HIDE_0 / PCT_FMT_HIDE_0 post-processing loop at the bottom of create_output().
Chart type: 100% stacked column - 6 work segments, single FY2025 bar

Think-cell paste: yellow rectangle only (A:B, header + 6 segment rows). Single category column renders as one 100% stacked bar; think-cell auto-computes %. Six segments: 5 service-PSC segments + PSC 1905 Embedded MRO (nuclear overhauls, RCOH, inactivations at SUPSHIP yards; distinct from J998/J999 depot repair). Total reconciles to RECONCILED_MRO_TAM ($8,971M). % of TAM column and Total row are reference-only (unshaded).
Chart type: Mekko - columns = vessel category, stacks = work segment (6 segments)

Think-cell paste: rows = 6 work segments (stack series), columns = vessel categories (column widths drive the Mekko). Five service-PSC rows are services-only SUMIFS per vessel column. Nuclear & Complex Overhauls row picks up per-supergroup PSC 1905 named ranges (Subs / Carriers / SurfCombs; Other column = PSC1905_MRO_UNCL). Amphib and Combat Logistics cells on that row are blank (no PSC 1905 attributable per classifier). Mekko total reconciles to RECONCILED_MRO_TAM.
Chart type: Cross-tab -- segment x hull program ($M); companion to tam_composition

Reads as: for each work segment (row), which hull programs (cols) drive spend. Services-PSC segments via SUMIFS on Awards[PSC] and Awards[Hull Program]. Nuclear & Complex Overhauls row: per-hull PSC 1905 named ranges (SSN / CVN / DDG / LCS) sourced from hull_program on each PIID; classified hulls below the $1M named-range floor (e.g. LSD) roll into Other. (Uncl) column on other rows = awards where Hull Program is blank (classifier could not attribute); significant for equipment-maintenance PSCs where PIIDs reference components rather than hulls. Data-quality signal.
Chart type: Mekko - columns = hull class (Marauder comp-set, desc by FY25 $), rows = 6 MRO work segments (stack series)

Think-cell paste (yellow rectangle): rows = 6 work segments (stack series), columns = 14 Marauder-like hull programs sorted descending by FY2025 MRO $ (matches hull_order_tam_composition pattern) + trailing Total column. Services-PSC cells are SUMIFS over Awards filtered by (PSC in segment codes) AND (Hull Program = hull). Nuclear & Complex Overhauls row is blank across every hull (PSC 1905 classifier does not attribute embedded MRO to MSC auxiliaries or USCG cutters). Dominant segments expected: Depot Ship Repair and HM&E. Per-column tier tags (mission-fit 1/2/3 from MARAUDER_TIERS) and per-hull column totals are reference-only (outside paste range). Zero-$ hulls land at the right end; hide in think-cell display filter.
Chart type: Funnel - TAM -> Depot Ship Repair -> Marauder-like Fleet MRO -> SAM

Think-cell paste (yellow rectangle): 4 funnel rungs. Col B = $M; col C = % of prior rung; col D = % of RECONCILED_MRO_TAM. SAM (rung 4) intersects Marauder comp-set (hull filter) with depot ship repair (PSC filter J998/J999). Rungs 2 and 3 narrow TAM along two orthogonal axes; rung 4 is the intersection -- so SAM $ is necessarily smaller than either rung 2 or rung 3. Hull filter: see taxonomies.yaml -> marauder_hulls (tiers 1-3 combined).
SAM = Marauder-like x Depot Ship Repair
